WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.title: Chudan Stance
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, gain {ChudanStrengthPower} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.title: Hasso Stance
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, apply [gold]next turn draw 1 card[/gold].
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, apply [gold]next turn draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}[/gold].
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.title: Gedan Stance

WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and {Amount} [gold]Counter[/gold] this turn.
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.title: Flow
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.description: Whenever you leave a [gold]Stance[/gold], reduce the cost of a random card in [gold]Hand[/gold] by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you leave a [gold]Stance[/gold], reduce the cost of a random card in [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Amount:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.title: Jodan
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.description:
On enter and turn start, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
Whenever you exhaust a card, gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.smartDescription:
On enter and turn start, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
Whenever you exhaust a card, gain {VigorPower} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.title: Waki
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, [gold]Shift[/gold] and Retain up to 1 card and reduce the energy costs of all Retained cards by 1.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, [gold]Shift[/gold] and Retain up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} and reduce the energy costs of all Retained cards by 1.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.selectionScreenPromp: Select a card to add Sly to.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.title: Shinigami
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.description: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card to resurrect.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.smartDescriptio: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} resurrect.
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM_POWER.title: Ronin Form
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM_POWER.description:
At the end of your turn,
your last card played gains Replay {Amount}, [gold]Exhaust[/gold], and is played.

WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE_POWER.title: Secret Sauce

WANDERER-COUNTER_POWER.title: Counter

WANDERER-STEADY_POWER.smartDescription: For the next {Amount} {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, you cannot leave your [gold]Stance[/gold].
